codeReviewIssues.description: Stale doc comment references removed type `TextRun::glyph_count` in SceneReader::shaped_glyphs(). Line reads: "`glyph_count` is the number of glyphs expected (from `TextRun::glyph_count`)." — TextRun no longer exists. Should reference the Glyphs content variant's glyph_count field instead.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The mission AGENTS.md 'Content enum design' section accurately documents the new Content variants and their field sizes. No gaps identified — the worker followed conventions precisely. The 'Node child ordering for N_DOC_TEXT' section correctly describes the per-line Glyphs + cursor + selection pattern that is now in use.

The architecture.md library file should be updated to reflect that Content::Text and Content::Path no longer exist, replaced by Content::FillRect and Content::Glyphs. The rendering pipeline description may still reference the old semantic content types. Not verified in detail since architecture.md wasn't part of this feature's scope, but it's a knowledge gap for future workers.

The os-worker skill file (SKILL.md) still references `system/test/tests/svg.rs` as a test target for SVG tests. This file was deleted in this commit. Future workers may be confused by the reference. The skill procedure was otherwise followed correctly (TDD tests written, full test suite passed, visual verification done).

summary: Clean implementation of the Content enum redesign. All validation assertions verified: (1) Content has exactly 4 variants: None, FillRect, Image, Glyphs — Text and Path removed. (2) TextRun, PathCmd, PathCmdKind types fully removed from scene library. (3) push_text_runs, push_path_cmds, text_runs, path_cmds, front_text_runs methods removed. (4) push_shaped_glyphs and shaped_glyphs retained and working. (5) Node is still 96 bytes (compile-time assertion at line 583). (6) FillRect carries only Color (4 bytes), Glyphs carries color+DataRef+glyph_count+font_size+axis_hash (20 bytes). (7) 15 new TDD tests covering round-trip, double-buffer, copy-forward, diffing, mixed content, mark_changed for both new types. (8) All unsafe blocks have SAFETY comments. (9) All #[repr(C)] structs properly documented. One non-blocking issue: a stale doc comment references the removed TextRun type. The 9-file, 6001-line removal with 1481-line addition was executed atomically as a single commit. Diff reviewed, handoff reviewed.
